headline: Kabupaten Karawang flood update for January 2026
summary: Banjir di Kabupaten Karawang caused minor damage to neighborhood access roads selama periode peninjauan terbatas.
summary_id: Banjir di Kabupaten Karawang caused minor damage to neighborhood access roads selama periode peninjauan terbatas.
summary_en: Flooding in Kabupaten Karawang caused minor damage to neighborhood access roads during the bounded review window.
